metadata.description: Open-source Claude Code plugins by Vamfi — AI-powered business mentoring, autonomous BMAD Cowork teams, and workflow automation for any business.

plugins.name: vamfi-business-mentor
plugins.description: AI-powered business mentor with strategic advice, proven frameworks (SWOT, Lean Canvas, OKRs), and coaching for any business type — from idea stage to scale.

plugins.name: bmad-cowork
plugins.description: BMAD Method as native Claude Cowork teams — 9 specialized AI agents (Analyst, PM, UX, Architect, Scrum Master, Developer, QA, Quick Dev, Tech Writer) that collaborate autonomously through phased workflows.

plugins.name: vamfi-founder-system
plugins.description: Founder operating system — 4 specialized agents and 8 skills that turn Claude into a practical chief-of-staff for solo founders. Covers opportunity validation, customer research, weekly planning, execution discipline, decision memos, and launch planning.
